DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT STATE FARM INSURANCE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained, with 20 days leave to amend. The first and second causes of action are uncertain and fail to state facts sufficient to support a cause of action against defendant State Farm Insurance. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)
